name: Power Generation
description: Gas turbine spare parts and field support for baseload, peaking, and combined-cycle power plants running GE Frame and Siemens SGT units.
longDescription: We supply certified gas turbine components for baseload, peaking, and combined-cycle power generation facilities. Our inventory covers hot gas path parts, rotor assemblies, and control system spares across GE Frame, Siemens SGT, and Alstom platform families.

name: Oil & Gas
description: Turbine support for onshore and offshore operations, including LM2500 and LM6000 aeroderivative platforms used in compression and power applications.
longDescription: We support oil and gas operators with turbine components for compression, pumping, and power generation. Our inventory covers aeroderivative platforms including LM2500, LM6000, and industrial frame units used in upstream, midstream, and downstream applications.

name: Marine & Offshore
description: Parts and technical support for marine gas turbine installations, where downtime isn't an option.
longDescription: We supply components for marine gas turbine propulsion and auxiliary power systems. Our inventory supports naval and commercial marine installations including both aeroderivative and industrial frame units operating in offshore environments.

name: Industrial Manufacturing
description: Industrial gas turbine services for facilities running captive power and cogeneration units.
longDescription: Our team supports industrial manufacturers operating gas turbines for captive power generation and cogeneration. We source components for Frame 5, Frame 6, and SGT-400 through SGT-800 units used in paper, chemical, and refining industries.

name: Utilities & Cogeneration
description: Reliable sourcing for utility-scale operators managing large turbine fleets across multiple sites.
longDescription: We serve utility operators managing fleets of gas turbines across multiple power generation sites. Our sourcing covers planned maintenance outages and emergency requirements for 7F, 9F, SGT5-4000F, and GT26 platforms with full quality documentation.

name: Government & Defense Power
description: NSN and CAGE-referenced turbine components for defense and government power installations, sourced with full documentation.
longDescription: We supply NSN and CAGE-referenced turbine components for defense and government power installations. Every part ships with complete traceability and MIL-SPEC compliance documentation suitable for audit.
